sql_array: CREATE TABLE string_comparisons (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 VARCHAR(255), str2 VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO string_comparisons (id, str1, str2, created_at) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'DB free', timestamp '2023-10-01 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO string_comparisons (id, str1, str2, created_at) VALUES (2, '', 'sample test', timestamp '2023-09-28 18:40:05');
INSERT INTO string_comparisons (id, str1, str2, created_at) VALUES (3, 'fuzzy', 'fuzzy', timestamp '2023-09-30 10:00:00');
SELECT id, jarowinkler(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM string_comparisons WHERE created_at > timestamp '2023-09-28 00:00:00' ORDER BY similarity;
SELECT id, jarowinkler('JAROWINKLER', str1) AS similarity FROM string_comparisons WHERE similarity < 0.5;
CREATE TABLE timestamp_tests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, event_description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO timestamp_tests (id, event_time, event_description) VALUES (1, timestamp '2023-10-01 14:00:00', 'Event 1');
INSERT INTO timestamp_tests (id, event_time, event_description) VALUES (2, timestamp '2022-01-01 08:00:00', 'Event 2');

SELECT j.id, j.str1, j.str2, j.similarity FROM (SELECT id, str1, str2, jarowinkler(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM string_comparisons) AS j JOIN timestamp_tests AS t ON j.id = t.id WHERE t.event_time < timestamp '2023-10-01 14:00:00' GROUP BY j.id HAVING AVG(j.similarity) < 0.6;
SELECT str1, str2, jarowinkler(str1, str2) FROM (SELECT str1, str2 FROM string_comparisons WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL AND str2 IS NOT NULL) AS filtered WHERE jarowinkler(str1, str2) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE mixed_operations (id INT PRIMARY KEY, num1 INT, str1 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO mixed_operations (id, num1, str1) VALUES (1, 100, 'Threshold check');
SELECT id, num1, jarowinkler(str1, 'check') AS similarity FROM mixed_operations WHERE jarowinkler(str1, 'check') > 0.5 AND num1 < 150;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(jarowinkler(str1, str2)) FROM string_comparisons WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL OR str2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY created_at;
SELECT jarowinkler(str1, '') AS similarity FROM string_comparisons WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_string AS SELECT str1, str2, jarowinkler(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM string_comparisons WHERE str1 <> str2 ORDER BY similarity DESC;
SELECT * FROM temp_string WHERE similarity > 0.8;
CREATE TABLE boundary_tests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, empty_field VARCHAR(255), low_precision_val DECIMAL(5,2));
INSERT INTO boundary_tests (id, empty_field, low_precision_val) VALUES (1, '', 0.01);
INSERT INTO boundary_tests (id, empty_field, low_precision_val) VALUES (2, 'test', 999.99);
SELECT id, empty_field, low_precision_val, jarowinkler(empty_field, 'test') AS empty_similarity FROM boundary_tests WHERE low_precision_val > 0.0;
ALTER TABLE string_comparisons ADD COLUMN similarity_score DOUBLE;
UPDATE string_comparisons SET similarity_score = jarowinkler(str1, str2) WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL AND str2 IS NOT NULL;
